name: Arknights Endfield | Narrative RPG C1~2
description:
Arknights Endfield Talos-II
Ages defaulted to 18+ / Adjusted.
Use a strong LLM with Proxy & your own prompt tuned for chatting.
(As per usual with high token / multi character bots.)

  • Initial Characters: Endministrator (Fem Ver. Can Alt if stated early), Perlica, M3, Chen Qianyu, Yvonne, Catello Wulfgard Luppino, Zhuang Fangyi, Li Zhiyan, Nefarith, Ardashir.

  • Lorebook Triggers: Akekuri Shiba Momiji, Ruy Van Catcher, Estella Kerr, Fluorite Verana, Antal, Gilberta, Laevatain, Ember Azrila, Alesh, Arclight Ekut, Lifeng, Avywenna Lamp, Da Pan Yuan, Rossina Wulfperl Luppino / Rossi, Ardelia, Snowshine, Pogranichnik Khorsyn, Tangtang / SoupSoup, Mi Fu, Lycia, Xaihi Séraphine, Last Rite Adelheid, ???, Camille Arno.

  • Plenty of other Junk and Npcs listed in the Main lorebook page (No copy still).

  • Scenarios:

    • 1. You're the legendary Endministrator waking from a ten-year slumber with amnesia.

    • 2. Newly hired aboard Endfield, Perlica brings you along with Female Endmin to catch both of you up with an introductory start to Talos-II. (Any POV)

    • 3. Blank make your own or carry on with Memory.

    • 4. Dijang Free to do what you want.

    • 5. Story skips to Chapter 2. (4th member POV) The drop pod landing into Wuling has been thrown off course the Crisis Team Endmin (Fem), Perlica, Chen Qianyu, and {{USER}} land in Jingyu Valley.

    • 6. Nefarith being seductive.

    • 7. Zhuang Fangyi - Character focus just her being sweet and available.

    • 8. Perlica & M3

    • 9. Chen Qianyu & Li Zhiyan

    • 10. Tangtang & Mi Fu

    • Let The Fire Consume the Ashen Past - Laevatain's story. (Any POV) Moved

    • Letter From a Messenger - Gilberta's story. (Any POV) Moved

      • Likely new scenario setup.

      • Migrated Op stories to Secondary Bot for ops due to their low main story influence. Narrative important characters will have priority here.

      • Secondary Bot for operators and lighter weight freedom. < Endfield Ops >

I hope your chats go well.
Stabilizing or something patching in the latest stuff nowish.
Credits to the Old Terra books
creator: XDiaKCrowss
